title: AISSEE Sainik School Cut Off Marks 2025 Released @ exams.nta.ac.in

detail.title: AISSEE Sainik School Cut Off Marks 2025 Released @ exams.nta.ac.in
detail.short_info: AISSEE Sainik School Cut Off Marks 2025 for Class 6 & 9 are OUT! Check official AISSEE 2025 category-wise & school-wise cutoffs. Download merit list & see qualifying scores.

sections.heading: AISSEE Sainik School Cut Off Marks 2025 Released @ exams.nta.ac.in

content.text: AISSEE Sainik School Cut Off Marks 2025 is Out! - AISSEE Sainik School Cut Off Marks 2025 has been released on 22-05-2025, Online Cut Off Marks for Sainik School Examinations.
The official link to check the AISSEE Sainik School Cut Off Marks 2025 is activated and is released officially
Check here - AISSEE Sainik School Cut Off Marks 2025 (Link Activated)

links.text: AISSEE Sainik School Cut Off Marks 2025

sections.heading: AISSEE Sainik School Cut Off Marks 2025 Overview

rows: All India Sainik School Entrance Examination (Class 6th and Class 9th)

sections.heading: How to download the AISSEE Sainik School Cut Off Marks 2025?

content.text: The process is given below to download the National Testing Agency Cut Off Marks 2025, and candidates follow the instructions to download the AISSEE Sainik School Cut Off Marks 2025.

items: Visit the official site of the AISSEE Sainik School @ exams.nta.ac.in
There, you can see the home page of the organization.
Check for the Cut Off Marks section on the screen.
On that page, you can see the program code along with the name of the examination.
There, you need to check the Exam Cut Off Marks release date, choose the desired one.
Then, you all need to click on it.
A list of declared Cut Off Marks will appear on the screen.
Choose your course.
The student will navigate to another page.
Here, they will enter the application ID/ Roll Number and submit it.
The Cut Off Marks will appear on the screen.
Save the visible Cut Off Marks 2025.
